segments.text: TIM: Good morning. You're through to the tourist information office, Tim speaking.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：早上好。这里是游客信息中心，我是蒂姆。

segments.text: How can I help you?
segments.translation: 有什么可以帮到您？

segments.text: JEAN: Oh hello. Could you give me some information about next month's festival, please?
segments.translation: 基恩：你好。请问你可以告诉我一些关于下个月的庆典活动的信息吗？

segments.text: My family and I will be staying in the town that week.
segments.translation: 那周我和我的家人会在镇上。

segments.text: TIM: Of course. Well it starts with a concert on the afternoon of the 17th.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：当然可以。庆典的第一场活动是在17号下午举行的演唱会。

segments.text: JEAN: Oh I heard about that.
segments.translation: 基恩：我听说过。

segments.text: The orchestra and singers come from the USA, don't they?
segments.translation: 歌手和乐队都是来自美国对吗？

segments.text: TIM: They're from Canada. They're very popular over there.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：他们来自加拿大。是当地特别受欢迎的音乐家。

segments.text: They're going to perform a number of well-known pieces that will appeal to children as well as adults.
segments.translation: 他们将要表演许多著名作品。大人和孩子都特别喜欢。

segments.text: JEAN: That sounds good. My whole family are interested in music.
segments.translation: 基恩：听起来不错。我们全家人都很喜欢音乐。

segments.text: TIM: The next day, the 18th, there's a performance by a ballet company called Eustatis.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：第二天，也就是18号会有一场由尤塞缇丝的芭蕾舞团呈现的演出。

segments.text: JEAN: Sorry?
segments.translation: 基恩：不好意思，叫什么？

segments.text: TIM: The name is spelt E-U-S-T-A-T-I-S.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：名字拼写作E-U-S-T-A-T-I-S。

segments.text: They appeared in last year's festival, and went down very well.
segments.translation: 他们去年也来了，节目很受欢迎。

segments.text: Again, their programme is designed for all ages.
segments.translation: 同样的，他们的节目也是老少皆宜。

segments.text: JEAN: Good. I expect we'll go to that.
segments.translation: 基恩：好的。我希望也能去看看。

segments.text: I hope there's going to be a play during the festival, a comedy, ideally.
segments.translation: 我希望庆典中能有一场戏剧表演，最好是喜剧。

segments.text: TIM: You're in luck! On the 19th and 20th a local amateur group are performing one written by a member of the group.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：你走运了。 19号和20号会有两场由当地业余剧团表演的戏剧，剧本是剧团的一个成员写的。

segments.text: It's called Jemima. That'll be on in the town hall.
segments.translation: 戏剧的名字叫做《杰米玛》。他们会在市政厅表演。

segments.text: They've already performed it two or three times.
segments.translation: 之前已经表演了两三次了。

segments.text: I haven't seen it myself, but the review in the local paper was very good.
segments.translation: 我自己没有看过，但是本地报纸对它评价很高。

segments.text: JEAN: And is it suitable for children?
segments.translation: 基恩：适合孩子看嘛？

segments.text: TIM: Yes, in fact it's aimed more at children than at adults, so both performances are in the afternoon.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：是的。事实上，比起大人，孩子才是他们的目标观众，所以两场表演都在下午。

segments.text: JEAN: And what about dance? Will there be any performances?
segments.translation: 基恩：舞蹈呢？会有舞蹈表演吗？

segments.text: TIM: Yes, also on the 20th, but in the evening.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：是的，也是在20号，但是在晚上。

segments.text: A professional company is putting on a show of modern pieces, with electronic music by young composers.
segments.translation: 一家专业舞蹈团将会表演几支现代舞，伴奏用的是年轻作曲家写的电子音乐。

segments.text: JEAN: Uh-huh.
segments.translation: 基恩：嗯嗯。

segments.text: TIM: The show is about how people communicate, or fail to communicate, with each other, so it's got the rather strange name, Chat.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：表演的核心是展现人们如何沟通或者交流失败的。所以它有一个奇怪的名字，《聊天》。

segments.text: JEAN: I suppose that's because that's something we do both face to face and online.
segments.translation: 基恩：我想那是因为聊天是我们上网或者面对面都会做的事情吧。

segments.text: TIM: That's right.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：是的。

segments.text: TIM: Now there are also some workshops and other activities.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：另外还有一些工作坊和其他活动。

segments.text: They'll all take place at least once every day, so everyone who wants to take part will have a chance.
segments.translation: 每天至少举行一次活动，所以任何想要参加的人都有机会。

segments.text: JEAN: Good. We're particularly interested in cookery - you don't happen to have a cookery workshop, do you?
segments.translation: 基恩：好的。我们对烹饪特别感兴趣。兴许碰巧有一些烹饪工作坊，会吗？

segments.text: TIM: We certainly do. It's going to focus on how to make food part of a healthy lifestyle, and it'll show that even sweet things like cakes can contain much less sugar than they usually do.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：确实有。这个工作坊将会关注如何将食物变成健康生活方式的一部分，展现了哪怕是像蛋糕这样的甜食也可以少含糖。

segments.text: JEAN: That might be worth going to.
segments.translation: 基恩：也许值得一去。

segments.text: We're trying to encourage our children to cook.
segments.translation: 我们正尝试着鼓励家里的孩子做饭。

segments.text: TIM: Another workshop is just for children, and that's on creating posters to reflect the history of the town.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：另一个工作坊也是关于孩子的。它教会孩子如何制作反映小镇历史的海报。

segments.text: The aim is to make children aware of how both the town and people's lives have changed over the centuries.
segments.translation: 课程的目标是让孩子了解数百年来小镇和人们生活的变化。

segments.text: The results will be exhibited in the community centre.
segments.translation: 作品会在交流中心展出。

segments.text: Then the other workshop is in toy-making, and that's for adults only.
segments.translation: 还有一个工作坊是制作玩具的，但是只对大人开放。

segments.text: JEAN: Oh, why's that?
segments.translation: 基恩：为什么呢？

segments.text: TIM: Because it involves carpentry - participants will be making toys out of wood, so there'll be a lot of sharp chisels and other tools around.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：因为涉及到木工活，参与者用木头制作玩具，所以会有许多尖锐的凿子和其他工具。

segments.text: JEAN: It makes sense to keep children away from it.
segments.translation: 基恩：不让孩子参与是有道理的。

segments.text: TIM: Exactly. Now let me tell you about some of the outdoor activities.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：确实。现在让我给你介绍一些户外活动吧。

segments.text: There'll be supervised wild swimming …
segments.translation: 包括有专人指导的野泳……

segments.text: JEAN: Wild swimming? What's that?
segments.translation: 基恩：野泳？什么意思？

segments.text: TIM: It just means swimming in natural waters, rather than a swimming pool.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：意思是在自然水域而不是游泳池游泳。

segments.text: JEAN: Oh OK. In a lake, for instance.
segments.translation: 基恩：哦，好吧，比如在湖里。

segments.text: TIM: Yes, there's a beautiful one just outside the town, and that'll be the venue for the swimming.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：是的，是在小镇之外的一个美丽的湖泊，那里会有游泳场地。

segments.text: There'll be lifeguards on duty, so it's suitable for all ages.
segments.translation: 现场还有值班的救生员，所以不论大人小孩都可以去。

segments.text: And finally, there'll be a walk in some nearby woods every day.
segments.translation: 最后，还有在附近树林的每日漫走活动。

segments.text: The leader is an expert on insects.
segments.translation: 领路人是一位昆虫专家。

segments.text: He'll show some that live in the woods, and how important they are for the environment.
segments.translation: 他会展示生活在森林中的一些昆虫，介绍它们对于环境的重要作用。

segments.text: So there are going to be all sorts of different things to do during the festival.
segments.translation: 所以整个庆典期间有各种活动可以参加。

segments.text: JEAN: There certainly are.
segments.translation: 基恩：确实是。

segments.text: TIM: If you'd like to read about how the preparations for the festival are going, the festival organiser is keeping a blog.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：如果你想要阅读一些有关庆典的准备活动，可以看看活动组织者的博客。

segments.text: Just search online for the festival website, and you'll find it.
segments.translation: 上网搜索活动网页就能看到。

segments.text: JEAN: Well, thank you very much for all the information.
segments.translation: 基恩：好的，十分感谢你分享的信息。

segments.text: TIM: You're welcome. Goodbye.
segments.translation: 蒂姆：不客气。再见。

segments.text: JEAN: Goodbye.
segments.translation: 基恩：再见。
